acquisition method: the MS/MS spectra were obtained in a data dependent acquisition in the top speed mode
alkylation reagent: the samples underwent reduction and alkylation processes using TCEP and iodoacetamide
enrichment method: applied to anti-Flag M2 affinity resin
fragmentation method: with higher-energy collision dissociation (target 5e4 ions, max ion injection time 40 ms, isolation window 1.6 m/z, normalized collision energy 30%)
instrument: electrosprayed into the Q Exactive Orbitrap mass spectrometer
ionization type: Peptides eluted from the LC column were directly electrosprayed
labeling: the experiment was repeated three times
